feed.title: Velu Immonen
feed.subtitle: PhD Student at Southampton Solent University. Studying the relationship between muscle size and strength.

entry.title: Hello, World
entry.content:
This is a sample blog post. Replace this with your actual first post.

Why I’m writing

A short explanation of what you’ll be writing about here — what topics, what cadence, what kind of reader you have in mind.

What to expect

Write a few short paragraphs here. The style on this site is direct — no hedging, no filler. Write like you’re explaining something to a smart friend who doesn’t already know your field.

# Code blocks look like this
def hello():
    print("Hello, world.")

Block quotes work well for highlighting a key insight or a quote worth preserving.

More text here. Keep paragraphs short. One idea per paragraph.

Closing

End with something concrete — a question you’re working on, a thing to look out for, a link to something related.
entry.summary: This is a sample blog post. Replace this with your actual first post.
